ccel.title: NPNF2-08. Basil: Letters and Select Works

source.title: NPNF2-08. Basil: Letters and Select Works
NPNF2-08. Basil: Letters and Select Works

verses.text: I am delighted at receiving what you write, but when you ask me to reply, I am in a difficulty.
What could I say in answer to so Attic a tongue, except that I confess, and confess with joy, that I am a pupil of fishermen?
